text: 🐻 Elon Musk's father told TASS in an interview he believes that Europe has lost touch with reality - except the Dutch-made butt plug. He's OK, because... "European leaders have completely lost touch with reality, except, perhaps, for the NATO chief, who agrees with Trump on everything. So Europe has become irrelevant in many respects, because the leaders there are not leaders. Nobody really knows who they are." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 埃隆·马斯克的父亲在接受塔斯社采访时表示，他认为欧洲已经与现实脱节——除了荷兰制造的肛门塞。他觉得没问题，因为……“欧洲领导人已经完全与现实脱节，或许除了北约秘书长，他在所有事情上都同意特朗普的观点。所以欧洲在许多方面已经变得无关紧要，因为那里的领导人根本不是领导人。没人真正知道他们是谁。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTdefender On Thursday, a total of six ships traveled through the Strait of Hormuz, a one ship increase since Wednesday but still significantly lower than averages seen prior to the Iran War, with today’s transits including two oil, chemical or liquid natural gas tankers, three cargo ships, and one bunkering tanker, according to data provided to CBS News by the global ship tracking firm MarineTraffic. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 周四，共有六艘船只通过霍尔木兹海峡，比周三增加了一艘，但仍远低于伊朗战争前的平均水平。据全球船舶追踪公司MarineTraffic提供给哥伦比亚广播公司新闻（CBS News）的数据，今天的过境船只包括两艘油轮、化学品或液化天然气运输船，三艘货船和一艘加油船。 推文

text: OSINTtechnical China pushed Iran towards a ceasefire in order to score diplomatic capital with the Trump administration, and hopes to use that credit to begin shifting U.S. policy toward the position that Taiwan is a "breakaway province that should reunite with the mainland" -WSJ tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 中国推动伊朗达成停火协议，旨在为特朗普政府积累外交资本，并希望利用这一信用开始将美国政策转向“台湾是一个应该与大陆统一的脱离省份”的立场——华尔街日报 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 WSJ: U.S. President Trump raised concerns in a phone call with Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu, that one official described as shorter than usual, that intensified Israeli strikes against Hezbollah could jeopardise the fragile ceasefire with Iran and efforts to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Trump told Netanyahu that he knows that Israel has a right to defend itself, but that he should tone down the airstrikes to support the ceasefire. U.S. officials fear that Iran may leverage Israeli strikes on Lebanon to get more out of the U.S. to keep the ceasefire on track during negotiations in Islamabad this weekend. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 华尔街日报：美国总统特朗普在与以色列总理内塔尼亚胡的通话中表达了担忧，一位官员称这次通话比平时短，特朗普担心以色列对真主党加强打击可能会危及与伊朗之间脆弱的停火协议以及重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的努力。特朗普告诉内塔尼亚胡，他知道以色列有权自卫，但他应该降低空袭强度以支持停火。美国官员担心伊朗可能会利用以色列对黎巴嫩的打击，在周末伊斯兰堡的谈判中从美国那里获得更多筹码，以维持停火进程。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇨🇺🇺🇸Cuban President Canel Diaz on if he would step down from his position if requested by the U.S.: "In Cuba, the people who are in leadership position is not elected by the US government, and they don't have a mandate from the US government. We have…" ⚡️ 🇨🇺 Cuban President Canel Diaz indicated that he would be willing to step down if the Cuban people found him unfit for office. "Concept of revolutionaries giving up and stepping down is not part of our vocabulary. If the Cuban people understand that I am not fit for office, that I am not rising to the occasion, then I should not be holding this position of president. I will respond to them." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇨🇺🇺🇸古巴总统卡内尔·迪亚斯在被问及如果美国要求他是否会辞职时表示：‘在古巴，担任领导职务的人不是由美国政府选举产生的，他们也没有美国政府的授权。我们有……’” ⚡️ 🇨🇺 古巴总统卡内尔·迪亚斯表示，如果古巴人民认为他不适合担任公职，他愿意辞职。“革命者放弃和辞职的概念不在我们的词汇中。如果古巴人民认为我不适合担任公职，认为我无法胜任，那么我就不应该担任总统这个职位。我会对他们负责。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇺 🇺🇸 Cuban President Canel Diaz on if he would step down from his position if requested by the U.S.: "In Cuba, the people who are in leadership position is not elected by the US government, and they don't have a mandate from the US government. We have a free sovereign state, a free state. We have self determination and independence, and we are not subjected to the designs of The United States. On the other hand, Cuban leaders are not here representing an elite of power. You can see my background where I was born, my family, what I've done throughout my life. We are elected by the people. Although there's a narrative trying to disregard that." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇺 🇺🇸 古巴总统卡内尔·迪亚斯在被问及如果美国要求他是否会辞职时表示：“在古巴，担任领导职务的人不是由美国政府选举产生的，他们也没有美国政府的授权。我们是一个自由的主权国家，一个自由的国家。我们拥有自决权和独立，我们不受美国意图的支配。另一方面，古巴领导人不是在这里代表权力精英。你可以看看我的背景，我出生在哪里，我的家庭，我一生所做的事情。我们是由人民选举产生的。尽管有一种叙事试图无视这一点。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇰🇼 🇮🇷 CBS: A U.S. injured in the Iranian drone strike that killed six U.S. personnel in Kuwait said that the unit was unprepared to provide and defense for itself in an unfortified position, rejecting U.S, Secretary of War Hegseth's characterzing the drone as one that squirted through defences. About a week before Operation Epic Fury was launched, personnel from the Army's 103rd Sustained Command were relocated to the Port of Shuaiba, which was only protected by concrete walls capable of stopping mortars or rockets, but no protection from aerial attacks. One soldier reports seeing intelligence that the site was one of Iran's potential targets in the region. One of the injured soldiers said that the attack was preventable. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇰🇼 🇮🇷 CBS：一名在伊朗无人机袭击科威特导致六名美国人员死亡事件中受伤的美国人表示，该部队在未设防的阵地没有准备好提供防御，拒绝了美国战争部长赫格塞斯将该无人机描述为“漏网之鱼”的说法。在“史诗之怒”行动（Operation Epic Fury）发起前约一周，陆军第103维持司令部的人员被重新部署到舒艾巴港（Port of Shuaiba），该港口仅由能抵御迫击炮或火箭弹的混凝土墙保护，但没有任何防空保护。一名士兵报告说看到了情报，称该地点是伊朗在该地区的潜在目标之一。其中一名受伤士兵表示，这次袭击是可以预防的。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Just so we understand who we are dealing with: These Islamic fanatics are ready to throw away a U.S. off-ramp to end this war. Not for the Iranian people. Not for the Lebanese people. For a radical terror proxy in Lebanon that calls itself Hezbollah. They will always choose continued destruction over peace. Every time. For what? A terror group that has nothing to do with the Iranian people. In no way shape or form should President Trump bow down to this Islamic regime demand. Separate Lebanon from IRGC immediately. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 为了让我们了解我们正在与谁打交道：这些伊斯兰狂热分子准备放弃美国提供的结束这场战争的下台阶。不是为了伊朗人民。不是为了黎巴嫩人民。而是为了黎巴嫩境内一个自称真主党的激进恐怖代理人。他们总是会选择持续的破坏而不是和平。每一次都是这样。为了什么？一个与伊朗人民毫无关系的恐怖组织。特朗普总统绝不应该向这个伊斯兰政权的要求低头。立即将黎巴嫩与伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）分开。 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Iranian state media deny reports about the arrival of Iranian delegation in Pakistan for talks with the Americans. A source tells Tasnim that negotiations won't start as long as Israel continues to bomb Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2042387598182633963/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）伊朗官方媒体否认有关伊朗代表团抵达巴基斯坦与美国人进行会谈的报道。一位消息人士告诉塔斯尼姆通讯社，只要以色列继续轰炸黎巴嫩，谈判就不会开始。 https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2042387598182633963/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel CBS, citing MarineTraffic: • 6 ships transited the Strait of Hormuz Thursday 2 tankers, 3 cargo ships, 1 bunkering vessel • Wednesday saw 5 ships, all cargo, zero tankers • Tuesday, when the ceasefire was announced, 11 ships crossed, including 9 tankers • Since Feb 28, 212 tankers have passed, about 58% of total traffic Pre war baseline for comparison: ~100–140 vessels per day • Total vessels since Feb 28: ~360–370 • At normal rates, that volume would move in about 3–4 days • Instead, it has taken roughly 40+ days Bottom line: traffic is running at roughly 5–10% of normal levels. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel CBS援引MarineTraffic的数据：• 周四有6艘船只通过霍尔木兹海峡，包括2艘油轮、3艘货船、1艘加油船 • 周三有5艘船只，全部为货船，零油轮 • 周二宣布停火时，有11艘船只通过，包括9艘油轮 • 自2月28日以来，已有212艘油轮通过，约占总交通量的58% 战前基准对比：每天约100–140艘船只 • 自2月28日以来的总船只数：约360–370艘 • 按正常速度，这些船只将在约3–4天内通过 • 相反，这花费了大约40多天 结论：交通量仅为正常水平的5–10%左右。 推文

text: Open Source Intel A massive fire has been reported at the Dos Bocas refinery in Tabasco, Mexico, with workers saying a tower at the coking plant is involved and heavy smoke rising. @ResistWire https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042386354655408225/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据报道，墨西哥塔巴斯科州的Dos Bocas炼油厂发生大火，工人称焦化厂的一座塔楼卷入其中，浓烟滚滚。 @ResistWire https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042386354655408225/video/1 推文

text_zh: Erika Kirk：黎巴嫩风格

text: 🥀 The last handwritten note of Iran’s Armed Forces Chief of Staff, Major General Abdolrahim Mousavi, before his martyrdom: ‘The world is a bad place , because even if you gain it all, you have gained nothing. But that is also the beauty of this world: even if you lose it all, you have in reality lost nothing.’ @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: 🥀 伊朗武装部队总参谋长阿卜杜勒拉希姆·穆萨维少将在殉难前的最后一张手写便条：“世界是一个糟糕的地方，因为即使你赢得了全世界，你也一无所获。但这正是这个世界的美妙之处：即使你失去了一切，实际上你也什么都没失去。” @Middle_East_Spectator

text: Open Source Intel American sources to MTV Lebanon: Washington relayed urgent intelligence to officials at the Republican Palace warning that Hezbollah is preparing street mobilization that could target state institutions. (I believe this means potential execution as well) Iran still has serious leverage and control over Lebanon tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国消息人士告诉黎巴嫩MTV：华盛顿向共和国宫官员传达了紧急情报，警告真主党正在准备可能针对国家机构的街头动员。（我认为这意味着潜在的处决）伊朗对黎巴嫩仍有严重的杠杆作用和控制力。 推文

text: WarMonitor A federal judge called the Pentagon’s revised press policy “the mark of an autocracy, not a democracy,” rejecting it as an attempt by the Trump administration to dictate coverage. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042378951281070568/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一名联邦法官称五角大楼修订后的新闻政策是“独裁而非民主的标志”，拒绝了该政策，称其为特朗普政府试图左右报道的企图。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042378951281070568/photo/1 推文

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 NEW: Strait of Hormuz traffic falls to the lowest since the first two days of the war @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 最新消息：霍尔木兹海峡的交通量降至战争头两天以来的最低水平。 @Middle_East_Spectator

text: An Israeli drone deliberately flying over the neighborhoods in Nabatieh, broadcasting audio recordings containing fabricated distress calls. One recording featured a man saying, "I'm Muhammad here, help me," While another featured a woman pleading for assistance Another broadcasted Latmiyat.
text_zh: 一架以色列无人机故意飞越纳巴提耶（Nabatieh）的社区，播放包含伪造求救信号的录音。一段录音中一名男子说：“我是穆罕默德，救救我”，而另一段录音中一名女子恳求援助。另一段则播放了哀歌（Latmiyat）。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 The US and Israel have deliberately bombed hundreds of schools, universities, hospitals and civilian sites across Iran in an unprovoked war of aggression. These aren't just war crimes – this is an attack on humanity itself.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 美国和以色列在伊朗各地故意轰炸了数百所学校、大学、医院和民用场所，发动了一场无端的侵略战争。这不仅仅是战争罪行——这是对人类本身的攻击。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Politico: U.S. President Trump vented to Secretary-General Mark Rutte during their recent meeting, expressing frustration over their lack of support during the war with Iran. Trump signalled he was considering reprisals against allies, while also pushing for concrete steps to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz. However, a White House official downplayed the exchange, stating Trump made no formal demands and has zero expectations from NATO, despite arguing that alliance members benefit heavily from the waterway. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Politico：美国总统特朗普在最近的会议上向秘书长马克·吕特发泄，表达了对他们在与伊朗战争期间缺乏支持的挫败感。特朗普暗示他正在考虑对盟友进行报复，同时也推动采取具体步骤帮助重新开放霍尔木兹海峡。然而，一位白宫官员淡化了这次交流，称特朗普没有提出任何正式要求，对北约也没有任何期望，尽管他认为联盟成员从这条水道中获益匪浅。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "and the Hormoz will open" Subject to tolls ofs
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Lebanese News and Updates：“而霍尔木兹海峡将会开放” 需缴纳通行费

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump posted about Iran on his Truth Social again: ‘Iran is doing a very poor job, dishonorable some would say, of allowing oil to go through the Strait of Hormuz. That is not the agreement we have!’
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普再次在“真实社交”（Truth Social）上发布关于伊朗的消息：“伊朗在允许石油通过霍尔木兹海峡方面做得非常糟糕，甚至可以说是可耻的。这不是我们达成的协议！”

text: ↩️ Reply to Middle East Spectator — MES: "—❗️🇺🇸/🇮🇷 President Trump on Truth Social:‘Iran is doing a very poor job, dishonorable some would say, of allowing oil to go through the Strait of Hormuz. That is not the agreement we have!’" Clown is mad and not giving threats lol Lebanon is part of the agreement you signed yet Israel massacred up to 500 of us in the past 24 hours Stop the war in Lebanon you bastard and the Hormoz will open
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Middle East Spectator — MES：“—❗️🇺🇸/🇮🇷 特朗普总统在‘真实社交’上表示：‘伊朗在允许石油通过霍尔木兹海峡方面做得非常糟糕，甚至可以说是可耻的。这不是我们达成的协议！’” 小丑疯了，没有发出威胁哈哈。黎巴嫩是你签署协议的一部分，然而以色列在过去24小时内屠杀了我们多达500人。停止在黎巴嫩的战争吧，你这个混蛋，霍尔木兹海峡就会开放。

text: 🇮🇷 Identification tag of Martyr Lieutenant General Seyed Abdolrahim Mousavi along with one of his last writings The world is a bad thing because even if you gain everything, you have gained nothing But this is also the good side of the world, because if you lose it all, you have lost nothing
text_zh: 🇮🇷 烈士赛义德·阿卜杜勒拉希姆·穆萨维中将的身份牌以及他最后的遗言之一：世界是一件坏事，因为即使你赢得了所有，你也一无所获。但这也是世界好的一面，因为如果你失去了一切，你也就什么都没失去。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸 A liquefied gas carrier ship that was trying to pass through the Strait of Hormuz is turning around and was not allowed to exit." 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 UKMTO: Maritime threat level in Persian Gulf and Strait of Hormuz remains 'critical'. Five vessels transited Strait of Hormuz in the past 24 hours.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench mirror：“🇮🇷⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸 一艘试图通过霍尔木兹海峡的液化气运输船正在掉头，未被允许离开。” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 UKMTO：波斯湾和霍尔木兹海峡的海上威胁级别仍然是“危急”。过去24小时内有五艘船只通过霍尔木兹海峡。
